title: I'll Be Going Now
overview: Two years after the world as we know it has ended, Shizuru leads an uneventful life in her hometown of Agano. But one day, she finds a clue that will lead her on a journey into the unknown to find her missing friend.

title: Suppose, Maybe, Presumably
overview: Shizuru and the others depart on their journey to Ikebukuro, but find that they are woefully lacking in supplies. As they ride along the Koma River, they spot a mysterious, long-necked shadow.

title: Short, Happy, and Easy
overview: The gang finds themselves welcomed by the friendly townsfolk of Higashi-Agano. Akira, however, can't shake the feeling that all is not as it seems with their generous hosts.

title: Why Are You Hiding Your Butt?
overview: As the train continues on its journey to Ikebukuro, each new stop begins to take weirder, wilder turns. Meanwhile, Akira appears to be hiding something from the others.

title: I'll Be Reduced to Bones
overview: Shizuru and Reimi find themselves prisoners near Inariyama Park. They must escape their tiny captors, and find a doctor to cure Akira's affliction before it's too late.

title: Was What I Said That Awful?
overview: Pochi-san appears to be feeling sick, much to Akira's dismay. In the ensuing argument, Nadeshiko confronts Shizuru to find out the truth about why Yoka has gone missing.

title: A Zombie That Laughs Is No Zombie at All
overview: Shizuru is taken captive, and Nadeko and the others must infiltrate a horde of zombies to rescue her. However, they'll first need to hoodwink the queen of the zombies.

title: Isn't That Bad Karma?
overview: Reimi is excited to head into Oizumi-gakuen, which has transformed into her favorite anime. However, they're met with a much bleaker retelling where the bad guys reign supreme.

title: More Boring Than I Thought
overview: Yoka wakes up to find herself in Ikebukuro, now transformed beyond recognition. Elsewhere, Shizuru and the others, still on their journey, run into a familiar face.

title: A True Symbol of Rebellion and Decadence
overview: Shizuru spots a mysterious silhouette on the train tracks near Higashi-Nagasaki, belonging to a mysterious creature who happens to remind her of someone.

title: Maybe She's a Lost Cause...
overview: The train finally reaches its last stop, Ikebukuro. Now it's up to Shizuru and the others to find Yoka and put an end to the 7G menace.

title: What Was Normal Again?
overview: Poison Pontaro sets off on an armored train with Yoka in tow. The fate of the world now rides on Shizuru and the gang, in hot pursuit aboard the Apogee.
